title: Spyglass Magnification
body:
Adds an enchantment named "Magnification", which can be applied to a spyglass using an anvil. 
The enchant comes in three levels, each increasing the spyglass's zoom.
|Enchant |Zoom |
|--------|-----|
|None    |x10  |
|Mag. I  |x24  |
|Mag. II |x64  |
|Mag. III|x160 |

This helps you to see distant objects with detail.
The vanilla spyglass zoom is x10, though this varies depending on your FOV settings.

### Obtaining
The Magnification enchantment can not be obtained using an enchantment table.
It can be found in any structure with enchanted books such as a stronghold. You can also get it through villager trading.
